name: Smart Watch Series 5
description: Feature-rich smartwatch with health monitoring, GPS, 50m water resistance, and 7-day battery life.

reviews.title: Best budget smartwatch I have owned
reviews.reviewText: The health tracking is accurate, the battery genuinely lasts 6-7 days, and the AMOLED screen looks great even outdoors. Counts steps, monitors sleep, and handles notifications beautifully.

reviews.title: Packed with features for the price
reviews.reviewText: Really good value. The GPS tracking is spot on for outdoor runs and the heart rate monitor is accurate. App interface could be smoother but the watch itself is excellent.

reviews.title: Looks and works great
reviews.reviewText: Comfortable to wear and the screen is vibrant. I appreciate the stress and SpO2 monitoring features. Highly recommend for anyone who wants a capable smartwatch without breaking the bank.
